summary_en: Nippon Felt acquired 414,000 shares (¥321.7M) on 2026-05-18 via ToSTNeT-3; cumulative acquisition under board authorization reached 836,200 shares (¥607.3M).
title_en: Notice Regarding Results of Share Acquisition via Off-Exchange Purchase Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
Nippon Felt Company Limited announced on 2026-05-18 the completion of a share repurchase transaction. The company acquired 414,000 ordinary shares at ¥777 per share, totaling ¥321.7 million, via the Tokyo Stock Exchange's off-exchange purchase facility (ToSTNeT-3). This transaction was conducted on the acquisition date of 2026-05-18.

The acquisition was authorized by the Board of Directors resolution dated 2025-10-31, which approved a buyback program with maximum parameters of 1.2 million shares and ¥750 million ceiling over the period from 2025-11-04 to 2026-05-29. As of the transaction date, cumulative acquisitions under this authorization totaled 836,200 shares for ¥607.3 million.
